name: PC control plus deep research smoke
objective: Use guarded PC snapshot, selector debugging, channel command routing, and quick research artifacts to assess an OS-agent research workflow.

steps.expect: structured UI nodes or a policy decision
ranked selector candidates or actionable guidance

steps.text: /pc-research-smoke compare OpenCode OpenClaw local PC agents

steps.expect: brief, sources, digest, plan, and claim trace files

expectations: No guarded OS action executes without policy authorization.
Selector diagnostics explain exact matches and fallbacks.
Channel commands route into the same orchestrator path as dashboard commands.
Research output includes evidence grades and claim-source traceability.
